docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,757.12 FILED BY KIMMEL, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT HOSTIE CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGDMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12/12/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KIMMEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOSTIE CORP IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIMMEL, MATTHEW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOSTIE CORP. $4,757.12 PRINCIPAL, $99.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,856.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $49.50) SERVED OCT-16-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOSTIE CORP.
